name: Workers comp vs suing: which better for serious injury in Centerville Utah?
description: Comp for quick pay; sue third parties for more.[1][5]

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing: which better for serious injury in Centerville Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for quick pay; sue third parties for more.[1][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp faster/no-fault for medical/wages; third-party suit for pain/suffering if others negligent.[1][5] Comp exclusive against employer.[1] Key factors: Comp limits noneconomic; suits uncapped but prove fault/harder.[1] Practical guidance: Do both if possible—comp immediate, sue separately; evaluate with attorney. Hybrids maximize recovery.
